name: Cake Mix Bar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cake mix (e.g., Pillsbury Plus Yellow, Butter, or Devil's Food)
6 oz chocolate chips (alternatively, try butterscotch chips or nuts for variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl until all lumps are nearly gone.
2. Add the chocolate chips and mix well.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
5. Allow the cookies to cool, then cut into squares.
